chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 490 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.2617/2025 2. For order on office objection No.22 & 34 3. For order on CMA No.2618/2025 4. For order on CMA No.2619/2025 5. For hearing of main case 06.02.2025 Mr. Amjad Hayat, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2,4 & 5. An application for provisional release has been filed before the departmental hierarchy on 03.02.2025. On the following date present petition has been filed seeking the same relief. This concurrent recourse to writ jurisdiction in presence of available adequate remedy could not be justified. Petition is dismissed in limine along with pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
